cta.title: Let's Grow Together

plantingGuide.title: Right Time, Right Planting
plantingGuide.subtitle: Boost your productivity with planting recommendations and maintenance tips optimized for seasonal cycles.

spring.label: Spring
tips: Soil temperature should be at least 15°C.
Seedling preparation should start at the end of February.
Initial irrigation should be light and regular.

summer.label: Summer
tips: Shading should be done against heat stress.
Efficiency should be increased with drip irrigation.
Attention should be paid to maturity at harvest times.

autumn.label: Autumn
tips: Ideal planting period for winter vegetables.
Soil preparation and fertilization are critical.
Precautionary measures should be taken early against frost risk.

winter.label: Winter
tips: Moisture balance should be protected against disease risk.
Day-night temperature difference should be optimized.

guideDetail.tipBody: Seed quality determines up to 60% of harvest yield. Do not skip soil analysis before sowing and keep the correct planting depth.
